description_long: This house features a striking modernist design with clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white exterior. Large glass block windows wrap around the structure, allowing ample natural light while maintaining privacy. The building is composed of intersecting rectangular volumes, with a prominent overhanging section and a flat roof. The front includes a paved entryway with a set of steps leading to a recessed main door, partially sheltered by the upper floor. The rear of the house features a wooden deck area, suggesting an outdoor living space. The property is set on a manicured green lawn, bordered by a low curb.
description: A modern, white house with large glass block windows, flat roofs, and intersecting rectangular forms, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, highlighting the intersecting volumes and extensive glass block windows on both floors.
description_view_1: This view shows the rear with a wooden deck area beneath a large overhang, and the glass block windows wrapping around the structure.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the tall, rectangular volume with a large glass block window and a paved path leading to the back.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main entryway with a paved approach, recessed door, and a prominent glass block facade above.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass block sections
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with paved steps, partially sheltered by an overhanging upper floor, minimalistic and unadorned
